function.name: _subtable_create_tool_bar_btn
function.description: Create a subtable toolbar button. Only Relation and LookupList field types support subtable toolbar buttons.

fieldId.description: Relation or LookupList field ID (must exist, field type must be Relation or LookupList).

name.description: Button display name, cannot contain special characters like , . / \

action.description: Button trigger behavior type. Options: RecordCreateRow (add a row; which fields are editable in the new row depends on the columnList in relationSetting or lookupListSetting — only columns with edit=true are editable), RecordDeleteRowList (delete selected rows), CallScript (call script), CallAutomatic (call automation)

actionSetting.description: Button behavior configuration (only for CallScript or CallAutomatic actions). When action is CallScript, func, scriptId and args are needed; when action is CallAutomatic, automaticId is needed, varList is optional.

scriptId.description: Script ID to call (required for CallScript)

args.description: Parameter list passed to the script (used for CallScript)

valueVar.description: Parameter variable expression. Supported variables: current user: ${user} (user object has id, name, roleList, departmentList properties, use ${user.id} for current user id); user selected record list: ${formSelectedRecordList}; user selected record ID list: ${formSelectedIdList}

automaticId.description: Automation ID to call (required for CallAutomatic)

varList.description: Variable list passed to the automation (optional for CallAutomatic)

value.description: Variable value. Supported variables: current user: ${user} (user object has id, name, roleList, departmentList properties, use ${user.id} for current user id); user selected record list: ${formSelectedRecordList}; user selected record ID list: ${formSelectedIdList}

subtableActionSetting.description: Subtable-specific behavior configuration (only for RecordCreateRow or RecordDeleteRowList actions).

valueList.description: Default value list when adding a row (used for RecordCreateRow).

value.description: Default value expression. Supports expressions like ${record.id} to reference the main table current record.

recordListExpression.description: Record list expression to delete (used for RecordDeleteRowList). Defaults to ${formSelectedRecordList}.

relationFieldId.description: Relation field ID (used for RecordDeleteRowList, can be empty string).

type.description: Button style type, default is default. Options: default, primary, success, warning, danger

icon.description: Button icon name. Common values: menu-add (add), delete-bin (delete)

hideExpression.description: Hide button when expression condition is met. Button is hidden when expression evaluates to true. Note: visibleRoleList is deprecated. Use hideExpression and disableExpression for button permission control.

disableExpression.description: Disable button when expression condition is met. Button is disabled when expression evaluates to true. E.g. ${formSelectedIdList.size()==0} to disable delete when nothing selected.
